title: Revenue Transaction
description: A financial revenue transaction event from billing or payment systems.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the transaction occurred.

amount_cents.description: Transaction amount in cents. Must be positive.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

customer_id.description: Identifier of the customer associated with this transaction.

product_line.description: Product line that generated this revenue.

region.description: Geographic region where the transaction originated.

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata associated with this transaction.
